title: Hotel Check-out 酒店退房
scene: 旅行结束，一家人到酒店前台退房。

lines.en: Hello, we'd like to check out. We're in rooms five-oh-one and five-oh-two.
lines.zh: 你好，我们要退房。我们住五零一和五零二房间。

lines.en: Certainly! Let me check your account. Did you have anything from the minibar?
lines.zh: 好的！让我查一下您的账单。您用过小冰箱里的东西吗？

lines.en: No, we didn't. We ate all our meals outside.
lines.zh: 没有。我们都在外面吃的。

lines.en: OK. Your total is one thousand two hundred yuan for three nights.
lines.zh: 好的。三晚总共一千二百元。

lines.en: That matches what we booked. Can I pay by card?
lines.zh: 和我们预订的一致。可以刷卡吗？

lines.en: Of course. Please put your card in the reader.
lines.zh: 当然。请把卡放在读卡器上。

lines.en: Here you go. Can I also leave my luggage here for a few hours?
lines.zh: 给你。我能把行李先寄存在这里几个小时吗？

lines.en: Yes, we can store your luggage. Your flight isn't until this evening?
lines.zh: 可以，我们可以帮您存行李。您的航班是今晚的？

lines.en: That's right. We'll come back around four o'clock.
lines.zh: 对。我们大概四点回来取。

lines.en: No problem! Here is your receipt. Have a safe trip home!
lines.zh: 没问题！这是您的收据。祝您一路平安！
